ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migrations" (
  "migration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration task */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the migration task was executed */,
  "target_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the target system or database */,
  "source_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the source system or database */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the migration task (e.g., Updated, Not Completed) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the migration task (e.g., Success, Skip) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Detailed message or error encountered during the migration task */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Identifier of the user who initiated the migration */,
  "data_volume" TEXT /* Volume of data migrated in bytes */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the migration task in seconds */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of retries attempted for this migration */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the batch process if part of a larger migration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_result FOREIGN KEY ("result") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_message FOREIGN KEY ("message") REFERENCES messages ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "systems" (
  "system_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the system (e.g., Database, File System, API) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the system */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the system */,
  "system_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the system */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., Active, Deprecated, Maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the system details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each result type */,
  "result_name" TEXT /* Name of the result type (e.g., Updated, Not Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result type */,
  "action_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if any follow-up action is needed based on the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each status type */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status type (e.g., Success, Skip) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status type */,
  "next_action" TEXT /* Suggested next steps based on the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message or error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the message (e.g., Info, Warning, Error) */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Standardized error code for easier troubleshooting */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Identifier of who or what system logged the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id")
)
